//: SHA-pinned Android corpus for the Android-XML a11y-checker regression gate (#109). Each entry is frozen at an exact commit so the only thing that can move the baseline numbers is THIS checker's own code (the Android producer: src/collect-android-xml.ts — the in-process res/layout* scanner + the two rules android-xml/image-no-label (1.1.1) and android-xml/control-no-name (4.1.2)), never upstream repo drift. The gated quantity is the FINDING stream: count, per-rule counts, and the full sorted finding list (file:line:ruleId). The pinned shas reproduce the proven prototype run that seeded this corpus — NewPipe yields exactly 18 image-no-label + 9 control-no-name. To extend: add a public Android app repo with real res/layout XML, resolve its sha (`git ls-remote https://github.com/<owner>/<repo> HEAD`), append an entry, then re-bless with `pnpm android:matrix:baseline`.

repos.source: A lightweight YouTube front-end for Android — large, mature, all-XML legacy View UI under app/src/main/res/layout*. The prototype that motivated #109 ran here and produced 27 findings (18 image-no-label + 9 control-no-name); this gate locks that exact reproduction.

A podcast manager for Android — another large all-XML View-system app. The prototype found 22 image-no-label + 9 control-no-name here (its committed reference also carried a third android-xml/editable-no-label rule that is OUT of this checker's two-rule scope, so the gate locks only the two shipped rules).
